heading: Delete a stream processing workspace
body:
To delete a stream processing workspace:**Delete-spi-cli:**Atlas CLITo delete one stream processing workspace in the project you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas api streams deleteStreamWorkspace [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas api streams deleteStreamWorkspace](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-api-streams-deleteStreamWorkspace).**Delete-spi-ui:**Atlas UI* Locate the overview panel of the stream processing workspace you want to delete

* Click the ellipsis ... icon in the upper-right.

* Click Delete workspace.

* When prompted, type the name of the stream processing workspace in the text field.

* Click Delete.**Delete-spi-api:**Atlas Administration APIThe Atlas Administration API provides an endpoint for deleting a
stream processing workspace.[Delete One Stream Workspace](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-deletegroupstreamworkspace)
